positive: A minimalist illustration featuring a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains should be rendered in deep indigo and royal purple, contrasting sharply against a vibrant gradient sky of orange, magenta, and teal. Foreground elements include simplified pine tree silhouettes and stylized abstract stars. The composition must be centered and highly graphic, designed for maximum impact on apparel. Clean lines, vector art style, strong silhouettes, high contrast, pop art influences, highly detailed digital illustration, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, grainy, noisy, artifact, text, watermark, signature, poor quality, multiple people, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, low detail, realistic photography
